title: Across the Channel
question: 把今天课文里的“大目标 -> 长期准备 -> 支持的人 -> 安全计划”放进你自己的学校挑战。把下面 3 个空补完整，用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: I am going to take part in a school challenge tomorrow. I am going to start at eight o'clock at school. I have practised for many weeks. My father will be watching me, and my friends will be waiting for me at the finish. I intend to take short rests and follow the safety plan.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说明明天的计划：参加一个安全的学校挑战
options.english_template: I ___ take part in a school challenge tomorrow.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说明准备：你已经练习了很多周

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 说明支持和安全：家人会看着你，朋友会在终点等你
options.english_template: My father ___ me, and my friends ___ for me at the finish.
options.expected_phrase: will be watching / will be waiting
